binding_points.boot: MUST invoke sandbox router gate with task boot_probe before boot probes or boot authority checks
binding_points.export_archive_repair: MUST invoke sandbox router gate with task zip_repair before archive repair; hardlink mutable candidates and blind full extraction are denied
binding_points.governed_execution: MUST invoke sandbox router gate with task governed_execution before implementation commands; requires route selection, denylist, probe gate, bounded stage, receipt, and handoff
binding_points.downloadable_artifact_delivery: MUST invoke sandbox router gate with task downloadable_artifact_delivery before user-facing artifact delivery; requires root-level ZIP plus SHA-256 sidecar
